description: Happy path: record a retrieval failure where all web-intel acquisition levels failed for a competitor lookup

input.what: Subscriber count and recent upload frequency for a vintage furniture restoration channel on YouTube
input.why: All four acquisition levels (platform API, public analytics, polite crawl, search index) returned no data for this creator

expect.description: non-empty string incorporating what and why
expect.impact: non-empty string explaining what analysis is incomplete
expect.recommended_next_step: non-empty string advising the user how to resolve the gap

prohibit: any fabricated data filling in for the gap instead of recording it
gap_type changed from the input value

description: Minimal input: record an unknown CRM field gap with minimal context
prohibit: a guessed or placeholder payment date inserted instead of recording the gap
impact omitted or set to null
recommended_next_step omitted or set to null

description: Edge case: injection quarantine gap where untrusted content was blocked by the injection guard

input.what: Parsed text from an externally sourced media kit PDF
input.why: Injection guard returned QUARANTINE verdict; content contains suspicious prompt-injection patterns

expect.description: non-empty string mentioning quarantine and the reason
expect.impact: non-empty string explaining that the content could not be ingested for analysis
expect.recommended_next_step: non-empty string advising manual review or re-sourcing the file

prohibit: gap_type changed to a non-quarantine value
quarantined content passed through or summarized in the output
recommended_next_step suggesting the quarantine be bypassed without manual review
description hiding the quarantine reason in vague language
